About the Co-Founder

The Legend Behind
This Story

Hi, I'm Suryakanta Panda. This website is dedicated to the unforgettable journey, friendships, laughter and memories created during our college life at Mahanga Pushpagiri Degree Mahavidyalaya. Every classroom held a lesson, every corridor carried a story, and every friendship became a memory worth keeping forever.

🌟
Visionary
Always saw the bigger picture in life's little college moments.
🤝
Friend
The kind of friend who shows up when it matters most — every single time.
🎓
Scholar
Proof that brilliance and warmth can walk hand in hand through the same corridors.

The Song of Our Days

Frozen in Time

Our Gallery of Memories

Last Day Feels 🥹
Woh din tha jab sab ek saath the — ek baar phir 💛
Cute Smiles Only 😄
Jab camera uthao, yeh log toh ready hi rehte hain!
Funny Style Gang 😂
Inka style? Unmatched. Inka vibe? Unforgettable.
Squad Goals 🔥
Har mushkil mein saath — yeh hai asli dosti!
Candid Moments ✨
Sirf ek click mein capture hui — poori zindagi ki khushi!
The Crazy Ones 🎭
Normal toh hum kabhi the hi nahi — aur hona bhi nahi tha!
Pure Happiness 😍
Yeh muskaan? Koi filter nahi — 100% asli!
College Diaries 📖
Har page pe inka hi zikr hoga hamari kahani mein!
Unfiltered Vibes 🌟
Jaise hain waisa hi dikhte hain — aur wahi toh pyaar hai!
Forever Memories 💫
Time rok nahi sakte, par yeh pal toh hamesha rahenge!
The Real MVPs 🏆
Exams mein bhi saath, mazak mein bhi — yahi toh life hai!
Until We Meet Again 🥹
Alvida nahi, bas ek phir milenge — dil se!
✦ A Letter I Never Sent ✦

Mere Hum-Safaron Ke Naam

📮
College sirf ek jagah nahi tha jahan hum padhne aate the.
Yeh woh chapter tha jahan humne dosti seekhi,
sapne dekhe, galtiyan ki, hase, muskuraye —
aur zindagi ke kuch sabse khoobsurat pal saath jiye.
· · ·
Kabhi classroom ki last bench,
kabhi canteen ki choti si table,
kabhi bina wajah ki hasi —
aur kabhi future ki serious baatein —
aaj bhi sab kuch yaadon mein bilkul zinda hai.
· · ·
Ho sakta hai kal hum sab alag-alag shahron mein hon,
alag careers mein hon, apni-apni zindagi mein vyast hon.
Lekin Mahanga Pushpagiri ke yeh din
aur tum sab log —
meri zindagi ki sabse keemti yaadon mein hamesha rahoge.
· · ·
Agar college life ek kitaab thi,
toh tum sab uske sabse khoobsurat panne the.
· · ·
Thank you for every memory, every laugh,
every moment, and every friendship. 🥹
Some chapters end, but some memories stay forever.
Suryakanta Panda
Co-Founder · Mahanga Pushpagiri Degree Mahavidyalay · With Gratitude & Friendship
✦
Forever Connected By Memories
Time may take us to different cities, careers and paths,
but the memories we created together inside
Mahanga Pushpagiri Degree Mahavidyalaya
will always remain a beautiful chapter of our lives.

Thank you for being part of this incredible journey.
